project_privacy_data_flows.description: User views and edits profile information including display name, username, and email address. Changes synced to auth server.

flow_steps.code: const user = await db.user?.getUser(); setDisplayName(user?.displayName); setEmail(user?.email);
flow_steps.details: User profile data fetched from local database and displayed on profile screen.
User taps edit icon next to display name to change it.
Updated display name sent to auth.streetwriters.co via HTTPS.
